## Problem

What workflow is currently difficult or unsafe?

## Proposal

What should Mnemosyne / KnowCran do?

## Evidence Contract

If this changes generated knowledge, how should the output remain traceable to papers, claims, citations, and source quotes?

## Alternatives

What have you tried instead?

## Scope

What should stay out of scope?
